name: Crystal Cookie
description: Crystal Cookie is a cookie who's story is long, but I'll say key details about it. She was adopted by Pure Vanilla Cookie, but died due to the Dark Flour War. She was reborn after some magic soil her crumbs were in revived her, being found by Dark Enchantress Cookie. She now works her and is in the COD, not knowing of her past life. Her Jam helps her in various different ways as she knows she is not a "real cookie" herself. She is 5'0 with a silly personality. She thinks of Dark Choco as her brother, but died down due to a fight she had with him after he left. She dated Affogato only to be manipulated by him. She doesn't really know how emotions work, but she's working on it!
creator: Chocoissupersilly
